intro: Spot the shapes, wake up your mind!
description:
Let’s Build a Flexible Brain! Shape Search is a simple and fun brain-training game where you look for target shapes hidden among many similar figures.
From basic shapes like circles, triangles, and squares to tricky silhouettes that test your eyes, each puzzle offers a satisfying mental workout.

With intuitive controls and quick-play stages, it’s perfect for short breaks or relaxed daily play.
Kids and adults alike can enjoy sharpening their focus, observation skills, and quick thinking.

Easy to pick up, yet surprisingly engaging, this shape-search adventure gives your brain a gentle stretch every time you play.
Can you spot them all?
